title: leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia
intro: Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia is a plant species belonging to the mint family and is commonly found in tropical regions. It is also known as the "Wild Marjoram" or "Sweet Marjoram". The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture for its health benefits.
benefits: Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia has many benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain, which can improve the quality of life for individuals suffering from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. It is also known to have antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and heart disease. Furthermore, this plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, showcasing its potential as a natural remedy for a wide range of ailments. By harnessing the medicinal properties of Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia, individuals can enjoy improved overall health and well-being, leading to a more fulfilling and productive life.
actions: Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia has many therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds. Its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties can aid in wound healing, while its antioxidant properties can protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and neurodegenerative disorders. Additionally, the plant's expectorant properties can help relieve respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, improving the quality of life for individuals suffering from these conditions. Overall, the therapeutic actions of Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia can have a significant impact on daily life, promoting better health, well-being, and productivity.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia contains compounds with significant anti-inflammatory activity, with compounds 5, 7, and 9 exhibiting notable effects.
constituents: Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (kaempferol, quercetin), terpenoids (ursolic acid, oleanolic acid), glycosides (leucacoside), phenolic acids (ferulic acid, sinapic acid), and essential oils (limonene, beta-pinene). These medicinal constituents possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which help in alleviating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The flavonoids and terpenoids present in Leucas ciliata var. oblongifolia also exhibit hepatoprotective and cardioprotective effects, thereby improving liver and heart health. By utilizing these constituents, people can experience enhanced well-being, improved quality of life, and relief from chronic conditions, ultimately contributing to a healthier and more comfortable daily existence.
